beer.jei.enchanting_table.info.bookshelf: By default, bookshelves can be placed up to 16 blocks away in any direction (X/Z) and up to 16 blocks vertically (Y).
beer.jei.enchanting_table.info.configura: The default ranges are configurable in the mod config.
beer.jei.enchanting_table.info.range_mod: You can modify the range of a specific Enchanting Table by sneaking and right-clicking it with specific items. Check the 'Enchanting Modifiers' category for details.
beer.jei.enchanting_table.info.title: Enchanting Table Range
